name: Ironpeak Town
description: A mining town built into the foothills of towering mountains. The constant ring of hammers on metal echoes through the valleys as miners extract precious ores from the rocky peaks.

center.name: Miners' Plaza
center.description: The town center bustles with activity as miners emerge from the mountain tunnels. Carts loaded with ore rumble over cobblestone streets toward the smelting district.

buildings.name: The Stonevault
buildings.description: Ancient dwarven vaults carved deep into the mountain by the first settlers. Massive underground chambers where clan members store their wealth and heirlooms.

buildings.name: The Pickaxe & Pint
buildings.description: A rowdy inn run by the sturdy dwarf Helga Stonebrew, where miners gather after long shifts underground. Loud rhythmic music echoes through the halls.

rooms.name: Tap Hall
rooms.description: A boisterous stone hall carved into the rock where off-shift miners pound the bar and the music shakes the dust from the rafters.

rooms.name: Ale Cellar
rooms.description: A deep, cool cellar hewn from the mountain, lined with kegs of Helga's famous stout.

rooms.name: Miner's Bunk
rooms.description: A sturdy stone-walled room with a heavy bunk, quiet enough to sleep off a long shift.

2.name: Stone Songs
2.description: Viol ballads of stone and ore

buildings.name: Ironhand's Supplies
buildings.description: Brogni Ironhand's no-nonsense supply shop, stocked with durable gear built to survive the harsh mountains.

buildings.name: Mountain Ore Exchange
buildings.description: A trading post that buys raw ores and sells mining equipment.

buildings.name: Miners' Guild Hall
buildings.description: The administrative center for all mining operations in the region.

south.name: Valley Approach
south.description: The southern approach to the mining town winds through rocky valleys carved by ancient glaciers. Mine cart tracks run alongside the main road.

buildings.name: Mine Cart Station
buildings.description: A depot where mine carts are loaded and dispatched to various mining sites.

west.name: Western Pass
west.description: A windswept pass on the mountain's western flank, where the cobbled road gives way to ice. The Frozen Wastes begin here — a tundra crossing toward distant Frosthold.
